migrations.description: Insert catch-all OUTREACH frame OUT-GENERAL-V1 (tier 5, no required_fields, POND type, LITE compilation, IMMEDIATE delivery). Ensures low-tier companies match during CID compilation.

validation_steps.expected: Returns 1 row: OUT-GENERAL-V1, Outreach General — Catch-All, tier 5, active.
